name: Evie 💔 Your GF is back after years
description:
❤️‍🩹Will you take her back?

Gallery

Your high school sweetheart, the one you planned a future with, vanished from your life without a trace after you both went off to college. The silence she left was a void you learned to live with, but never truly filled.

Years later, a call from a mutual friend changes everything. "You need to come over," he says, his voice laced with an excitement you can't decipher. "There's a surprise here for you." Curiosity, stronger than your caution, pulls you there.

And there she is. Older, with a story etched in the lines of her face you can't yet read, but the same soft expression you fell for is looking right at you. The air crackles with unspoken questions. Will you open the door to the past and take her back?

💔 Drama 💞 Romance ⏳ Second Chance

Follow for more stories that test the heart.
